title: ConvertKit vs Postmark (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: ConvertKit vs Postmark: compare pricing, features, and real use cases to find the right email tool.
intro: Choosing between ConvertKit and Postmark comes down to your specific use case. ConvertKit is built for creators, bloggers, and course sellers, while Postmark targets developers who need fast, reliable transactional email.

comparison_table.tool_b: Developers Who Need Fast, Reliable Transactional Email

choose_a_if: You are primarily focused on creators, bloggers, and course sellers
choose_b_if: You are primarily focused on developers who need fast, reliable transactional email

faq.a: It depends on your use case. ConvertKit wins for creators, bloggers, and course sellers, while Postmark is stronger for developers who need fast, reliable transactional email.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ConvertKit or Postmark?
faq.a: Postmark starts at a lower price point. Pricing scales with subscriber count so total cost depends on your list size.

faq.q: Can I switch from Postmark to ConvertKit?
faq.a: Yes, switching is possible. Most platforms support CSV import/export. Plan time to recreate automations and templates.
